chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5441 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.22772/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.03.2025 Mr. Khan Muhammad Bangush, advocate for the petitioner. Petitioner has impugned a notice of demand issued by the Cantonment Board dated 27.07.2019. The petition was filed in 2021. Prima facie, the same is barred by laches. In view hereof, petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
